title: USA face tricky Paraguay in opening match of World Cup 2026
original_text:
FIFA World Cup cohosts United States begin their campaign against Paraguay, with Donald Trump’s attendance in doubt.

Who : USA vs Paraguay
What : FIFA World Cup 2026 Group D match
Where : SoFi Stadium, Los Angeles, California
When : Friday, 6pm local time (01:00 GMT Saturday)
How to follow : We’ll have all the build-up on
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
